variants: Kira Asakura hails from the quaint town of Pebblefin Creek and now makes her home in Fairhaven Steps. She is celebrated for her invention, the Orbifold Mapping Device, which has earned her significant recognition in her field. For her innovative contributions, she received the Cerulean Grove Merit. In her leisure time, Kira enjoys being an active member of the Ursine Honey Collectors, where she shares her passion for beekeeping and the art of honey collection.

Apart from her professional accolades, Kira is also involved with the Ursine Honey Collectors, engaging with fellow members in their shared interest of honey gathering.
